name: Squats
cue: Stand side-on to the camera so your knee angle is visible.

name: Push-Ups
cue: Get into a plank facing sideways so your elbow angle is visible.

name: Pull-Ups
cue: Face the camera with your full upper body visible while hanging from the bar.

name: Sit-Ups
cue: Lie sideways to the camera so your hip and knee are visible. Knees bent.

name: Jumping Jacks
cue: Face the camera straight on with your full body visible.
